name: @orijinmain/corch
description: A detachable Codex orchestration plugin with native automatic worker selection.

scripts.generate:hook-types: json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/session-start.command.input.schema.json --output hooks/generated/session-start-input.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/session-start.command.output.schema.json --output hooks/generated/session-start-output.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/subagent-start.command.input.schema.json --output hooks/generated/subagent-start-input.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/subagent-start.command.output.schema.json --output hooks/generated/subagent-start-output.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/pre-tool-use.command.input.schema.json --output hooks/generated/pre-tool-use-input.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/pre-tool-use.command.output.schema.json --output hooks/generated/pre-tool-use-output.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/user-prompt-submit.command.input.schema.json --output hooks/generated/user-prompt-submit-input.ts && json2ts --unknownAny --no-enableConstEnums --input schemas/codex-hooks/rust-v0.144.5/user-prompt-submit.command.output.schema.json --output hooks/generated/user-prompt-submit-output.ts
scripts.check:hook-types: npm run generate:hook-types && git diff --exit-code -- hooks/generated

author: orijinmain
